_meta: Canonical string inventory for the 4 live listing frames. Every value is an EXACT raw-HTML fragment as it appears in frames/*.html (entities like &/  and inline markup included). scripts/build-localized-frames.mjs uses these values as search needles (longest-first, single pass) and replaces them with the same key's value from <locale>.json. Keys starting with '_' are ignored by the substitution engine. Numbers, prices and currency ($) must stay identical in every locale.
hero.h1: Carts leak between devices. Yours won’t.
hero.sub: Persistent Cart silently saves every signed-in cart to the customer’s account. When they log in on another device, it’s already there.
hero.emptyHint:
No error. No email.
They rebuild — or leave.
panel.title: Cart Transfer Value
panel.heroTransfersHint: Times a saved cart moved to another device.
panel.revenueHint: Order value from orders with cart transfers.
panel.footer: Last updated just now. Showing the last 30 days.
f2.h1: See what synced carts bring back
f2.sub: The dashboard counts every cart transfer, the orders that follow, and the revenue attached — in your store's currency.
f2.banner: You've generated $452,098 from cart transfers in the last 30 days
f2.cardTransfersHint: Times a customer's saved cart moved to another device.
f2.cardOrdersHint: Orders placed after a customer moved a saved cart across devices.
f4.h1: No emails. No pop-ups. No opt-ins.
f4.conOff: Recovery emails fire after the cart is gone — and only reach shoppers who opted in.
f4.conOn: Persistent Cart restores the latest cart the moment a customer logs in. That's it.
f6.sub: Line-item-heavy wholesale carts sync and merge across devices without a hiccup — with no cart-storage time limit, carts stay saved until checkout.
